evidence_snippet: Still a member of Lady Stoneheart's outlaws
Tom comes from Sevenstreams in the northern riverlands.
Arya's group meets Tom's one-time lover, Lady Ravella Smallwood, at Acorn Hall.
Tom sang at the wedding of his cousin, Ser Pate of the Blue Fork, to Amerei Frey
He plays a dirge after the battle at the burning septry for Brave Companions as they are hanged.
Tom serves for a fortnight as a musician in the company of Ser Ryman Frey during the siege of Riverrun.
When asked by Jaime why he does not depart with the Freys after Riverrun's surrender
